title: OrcaDolittle derived analysis artifacts
description: Derived artifacts, metrics, figures, provenance tables, and reproduction notebooks for OrcaDolittle, a frozen-encoder analysis of public killer-whale acoustic data. The package supports acoustic-structure, behavioural-context association/production, and dialect-selective receiver-response analyses. It does not claim translation, semantic meaning, or content-controlled playback. Raw third-party audio, raw DTAG files, model weights, runtime caches, and non-public working files are intentionally excluded.

creators.name: Lesin, Danielle
creators.affiliation: Georgia Institute of Technology, College of Computing

notes: DCLDE 2026 killer-whale annotations are distributed by NOAA/NCEI with a public Google Cloud Storage mirror; DTAG behavioural-context recordings are openly deposited (CC-BY-4.0). Raw audio and tag archives are not redistributed here and are downloaded from their public sources by the pipeline scripts. The current submission uses the frozen package under concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21030081; later Git commits clarify documentation and presentation without changing deposited large-artifact hashes or reported metrics.
